I specifically chose this plan for the generous 5GB daily allocation and it has delivered exactly as promised. For someone who works remotely and needs reliable mobile data throughout the day this balance is perfectly calibrated. For someone who uses mobile data throughout the day this matters.

The 2.5GB daily data is adequate for my modest needs but nothing impressive. However the internet speed of 150 Mbps is genuinely fast when the data lasts. Average quantity good quality. I appreciate the transparency in how data consumption is tracked.
Data too little but at least speed is good.

The 750MB daily data cap combined with aggressive background data consumption means I effectively have no usable data for the second half of every day. The plan is designed for 2015 usage patterns not 2026 reality where apps consume data constantly.
